title: COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and delivers used furniture and household items. Available items vary, depending on inventory. The warehouse can typically offer sofas, dining tables, chairs, mattresses, box springs, dishes, cookware, small appliances, linens (including sheets, blankets, and pillows), and other miscellaneous household goods. 464 NE 219th Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: By referral only. Low-income individuals or families seeking essential household furnishings. Hours: Wednesday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-noon Email (503) 235-8786 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 235-8786 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: A referral from an agency partner is necessary to schedule an appointment. Visit website for a list of participating agencies, which includes local social services agencies. Families with children in public grade school or Head Start should speak with the school's social worker about a possible referral. FEES: $150 Furniture Bank fee for all furniture selected at the time of the appointment. Additional $250 for delivery service. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Fairview, Gresham, Troutdale, Portland, and Wood Village SITE HOURS: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Services: Bedding/Linen Furniture Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM
